result.text:
Congrats to the artist 💫
#888innerartist 

“I’ll be okay” on @foundation 

This piece is an exploration of the profound connection between nature and the human spirit, focusing on themes of mindfulness, meditation, and self-discovery. In this project, I use photography and AI to create otherworldly scenes that invite viewers to reflect on their inner landscapes through the lens of the natural world.
